message:
feat(fsqlite-func): add window function builtins and expand datetime functions (bd-3go.9)

- Add window function builtin stubs for aggregate evaluation with OVER clauses
- Expand datetime function coverage for strftime, date, time, and datetime variants
- Prepare evaluation engine for deferred aggregate computation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
